expert_outputs.summary: Payment routing monitors fraud probability, escrow milestones, and reconciliation exceptions before funds move.
Financing capacity is acceptable under balanced leverage and moderate stress assumptions.
Release gate confirms identity, records, privacy, and screening posture before output release.

Return model favors resilient income and capital preservation over pure premium upside.

evidence: three to five market comparables per candidate

Coverage options remain placeable with manageable premium variance across top candidates.

ranked_recommendations.title: Athens Urban Residential Block
ranked_recommendations.summary: Income-oriented multifamily opportunity with strong downside resilience and optional residency value.
ranked_recommendations.comparable_summary: Comparable multifamily-style blocks and stabilized rent rolls support the value range.
ranked_recommendations.trend_signal: Yield-driven demand remains constructive despite moderate market volatility.
ranked_recommendations.location_intelligence: Dense urban amenities and diversified occupancy drivers improve resilience.
ranked_recommendations.recommendation_rationale: Recommendation expert ranks this first because yield, resilience, and diversification best match the investor profile.
ranked_recommendations.why: Athens Urban Residential Block scored well because valuation confidence, fit, and governance posture remain strong for a cross_border profile in Portugal.
ranked_recommendations.investment_insight: Top blend of yield, occupancy resilience, and diversification in the current set.
ranked_recommendations.visa_pathway: Greece Golden Visa adjacency is attractive but should be monitored for policy shifts.
ranked_recommendations.insurance_option: Landlord plus catastrophe cover remains accessible with manageable exclusions.

ranked_recommendations.title: Lisbon Urban Rental Pair
ranked_recommendations.summary: Balanced dual-asset strategy with efficient financing and optional future owner use.
ranked_recommendations.comparable_summary: Two-unit Lisbon rental comparables indicate stable income pricing with manageable vacancy assumptions.
ranked_recommendations.trend_signal: Balanced market momentum with moderate regulatory watchpoints.
ranked_recommendations.location_intelligence: Central urban access and flexible exit paths support optional future owner use.
ranked_recommendations.recommendation_rationale: Recommendation expert keeps it near the top because flexibility and capital efficiency are strong.
ranked_recommendations.why: Lisbon Urban Rental Pair scored well because valuation confidence, fit, and governance posture remain strong for a cross_border profile in Portugal.
ranked_recommendations.investment_insight: Best flexibility and financing efficiency for a balanced portfolio lens.
ranked_recommendations.visa_pathway: Portugal residency is less central here, but optional relocation remains open.
ranked_recommendations.insurance_option: Portfolio landlord package with moderate carry and straightforward placement.

ranked_recommendations.title: Dubai Marina Branded Residence
ranked_recommendations.summary: Premium globally mobile asset with high upside and higher insurance carry.
ranked_recommendations.comparable_summary: Premium branded residence comps confirm upside but with a wider premium-market spread.
ranked_recommendations.trend_signal: Momentum is favorable yet more cyclical than the Mediterranean income plays.
ranked_recommendations.location_intelligence: Liquidity and prestige are strong, but FX and carrying cost sensitivity are higher.
ranked_recommendations.recommendation_rationale: Recommendation expert lowers the rank because premium carry and budget pressure reduce fit.
ranked_recommendations.why: Dubai Marina Branded Residence scored well because valuation confidence, fit, and governance posture remain strong for a cross_border profile in Portugal.
ranked_recommendations.investment_insight: Strong upside, but lower resilience when FX and premium operating costs widen.
ranked_recommendations.visa_pathway: UAE investor residence route is strong for globally mobile investors.
ranked_recommendations.insurance_option: High-value property coverage with premium documentation requirements.

policy_gates.name: ai_management
policy_gates.details: Operate the AI management system under ISO/IEC 42001 with documented ownership, risk treatment, and human oversight.

policy_gates.name: aml
policy_gates.details: Check source-of-funds completeness, transaction anomaly indicators, and enhanced due diligence thresholds.

policy_gates.name: business_continuity
policy_gates.details: Preserve workflow continuity with alternate queues, RTO/RPO monitoring, failover runbooks, and transaction recovery evidence.

policy_gates.name: data_quality
policy_gates.details: Apply ISO/IEC 5259-aligned controls for data provenance, completeness, freshness, comparability, and traceable remediation.

policy_gates.name: data_residency
policy_gates.details: Apply region-aware storage, transfer, retention, and deletion constraints to profile and decision data.

policy_gates.name: explainability
policy_gates.details: Preserve user-facing reasons, comparable-set rationale, and feature contribution summaries for each decision.

policy_gates.name: fairness
policy_gates.details: Measure ranking fairness, disparate impact, and preference weighting drift before releasing recommendations.

policy_gates.name: jurisdiction
policy_gates.details: Verify local property ownership, residency-by-investment, cross-border disclosure, and servicing rules.

policy_gates.name: kyc
policy_gates.details: Confirm identity evidence, beneficial ownership, and document completeness before high-trust actions are released.

policy_gates.name: licensing
policy_gates.details: Ensure insurance distribution and advisory actions fit the servicing entity permissions.

policy_gates.name: mfa
policy_gates.details: Require phishing-resistant MFA for privileged actions, high-risk sessions, and sensitive expert outputs.

policy_gates.name: model_risk
policy_gates.details: Record model lineage, confidence, bias review, and evaluation thresholds for AI-assisted outputs.

policy_gates.name: pci_dss
policy_gates.details: Isolate cardholder data, use tokenization, protect payment pages, and log reconciliation activity under PCI DSS controls.

policy_gates.name: privacy
policy_gates.details: Enforce purpose limitation, data minimization, consent propagation, and profile-specific privacy controls.

policy_gates.name: rbac
policy_gates.details: Authorize access with least privilege, role scoping, and entitlement checks before expert invocation or release.

policy_gates.name: records
policy_gates.details: Write immutable audit logs with inputs, outputs, lineage, approvals, and identity state.

policy_gates.name: risk_thresholds
policy_gates.details: Block release when fraud, climate, cyber, session, or financial risks exceed threshold.

policy_gates.name: sanctions
policy_gates.details: Screen sanctioned individuals, entities, PEP relationships, and high-risk geographies before release.

policy_gates.name: suitability
policy_gates.details: Check affordability, investor category, and product suitability against client profile and constraints.

audit_trail.name: experts.selected
audit_trail.detail: Selected experts unified_compliance_risk_intelligence:sync, payment_intelligence:sync, financial_risk:sync, compliance_validation:sync, residency_eligibility:async, investment_analysis:sync, property_valuation:sync, listing_recommendation:sync, insurance_matching:async, ux_personalization:sync.

audit_trail.name: audit.packet.persisted
audit_trail.detail: Decision packet persisted to evidence store and event stream.

property_decision.recommendation: Deliver a cross_border investor brief led by Athens Urban Residential Block, ranking assets by fair value, comparable-set strength, risk-adjusted return, location intelligence, residency alignment, insurability, and financing readiness using signals from unified_compliance_risk_intelligence, payment_intelligence, financial_risk, compliance_validation, residency_eligibility, investment_analysis while honoring confidential privacy controls.
property_decision.explanation: EstateOS ingested frontend profile signals for investor_type 'cross_border', financial intent 'income plus long-term appreciation', residency goal 'golden visa pathway for family relocation', and locale 'en-US'. The request was evaluated with auth assurance 'aal2', MFA=on, KYC='approved', and sanctions='clear'. Top-ranked expert was unified_compliance_risk_intelligence at 0.99. Top-ranked recommendation was 'Athens Urban Residential Block' in Athens, Greece with composite score 0.63. The routing layer combined synchronous and asynchronous experts, evaluated 19 policy gates, applied ISO/IEC 5259, ISO/IEC 42001, ISO/IEC 27001, and ISO 22301 governance controls, and ended with release status 'released'. Review flags: ['none'].

governance_status.explanation: Data quality governance monitors market feeds, comparables, trend features, and location intelligence before valuation and ranking outputs are released.
The AI management layer records accountable owners, ranking and valuation risks, fairness checks, and manual review triggers for sensitive releases.
Information-security controls verify identity posture, access governance, auditability, and protective monitoring before EstateOS outputs can be exported or operationalized.
Business continuity governance maintains alternate routing paths, replayable event streams, and recovery checkpoints for critical transaction and advisory workflows.

pricing_strategy.headline: Anchor near 598,000 with protected concession bands.
pricing_strategy.detail: Pricing strategy recommends an anchored opening position, a documented walk-away threshold, and contingency pricing that preserves margin if diligence reveals title, financing, or disclosure friction.
pricing_strategy.next_action: Prepare counteroffer ladder with opening, midpoint, and walk-away thresholds.

negotiation_insight.headline: Use deadline-backed concessions and keep document deficiencies as leverage.
negotiation_insight.detail: Negotiation insight favors time-boxed counters, explicit document conditions, and concession sequencing that trades speed for signature certainty rather than headline price alone.
negotiation_insight.next_action: Issue a counter with an expiration window and evidence-based contingency carve-outs.

document_validation.headline: Do not advance to closing until title, disclosures, and signatures clear validation.
document_validation.detail: Document validation reviewed 3 artifacts, found 1 not-yet-validated items, and logged 1 compliance or execution issues for remediation.
document_validation.next_action: Route open document issues to owners and require re-validation before approval.

risk_scoring.headline: Escalate when counterparty friction, leverage, or document drift exceed tolerance.
risk_scoring.detail: Deal risk scoring combines counterparty posture, market volatility, document exceptions, financing leverage, and workflow integrity checks into a single escalation score.
risk_scoring.next_action: Lock release behind approval if the risk score remains above the configured threshold.

continuity_notes: All stage changes are event-sourced and replayable.
Manual continuity runbook is attached to approval and closing stages.
BCDR tier tier_1 maps to workflow replay and alternate-queue failover.

compliance_controls.detail: RBAC and MFA protect pricing, negotiation, and release decisions for sensitive transactions.
Every stage transition, expert recommendation, and approval is written to an immutable event chain.
Critical deal workflows have defined recovery paths, alternate queues, and manual playbooks.
Deal release requires validated title, disclosure, diligence, and closing artifacts before advancing the workflow.

recommendations: Prepare counteroffer ladder with opening, midpoint, and walk-away thresholds.
Issue a counter with an expiration window and evidence-based contingency carve-outs.
Route open document issues to owners and require re-validation before approval.
Lock release behind approval if the risk score remains above the configured threshold.
Preserve all approvals, counters, and continuity checkpoints in the audit ledger before closing.
transaction_decision.explanation: Transaction deal-3e234652 for Lisbon Green Quarter acquisition is in stage 'document_validation' with risk rating 'moderate'. Pricing confidence=0.87, negotiation confidence=0.83, document validation confidence=0.82, and workflow integrity is 'intact'. ISO/IEC 27001 controls protect access, evidence, and document handling while ISO 22301 controls preserve continuity through active-active routing and replayable events.

payment_decision.payment_behavior_summary: Payer behavior is stable across token usage, timing, and identity context.
payment_decision.frontend_security_posture: PCI DSS hosted payment fields, tokenized instruments, CSP/WAF controls, and log redaction protect the frontend payment experience.

signals.detail: Session is bound to MFA and a trusted device.
Amount 120,000 is checked against payer velocity and historical behavior.
Cross-border payment routes trigger enhanced beneficiary, sanctions, and settlement monitoring.
Chargeback history feeds the fraud probability model and manual-review thresholds.

escrow_conditions.detail: Escrow release requires settled funds and beneficiary matching.
Closing, identity, and approval milestones must be complete before release.
Release requires dual approval with segregation of duties and immutable event logging.

reconciliation_entries.detail: PSP references are reconciled without exposing raw cardholder data.
Escrow ledger events are matched to bank/PSP settlement references.
Signed webhooks, settlement files, and exception queues drive reconciliation closeout.

recommended_actions: Keep the user in hosted payment fields and masked token views.
Allow escrow progression when settlement and approvals remain clean.
Match settlement references and escrow ledger entries before reconciliation close.
payment_decision.explanation: Payment deal-3e234652 was evaluated for 120,000 USD using method 'wire' with escrow stage 'release_pending'. Fraud probability=0.36, risk level='low', cross_border=True, trusted_device=True, and release_status='released'. The frontend remains PCI-safe by using tokenized instruments and hosted payment fields while backend controls score payer behavior, escrow conditions, and reconciliation posture.

acord_coverages.notes: Captures dwelling, occupancy, mortgagee, and peril details for quote intake.
Binds ownership, lender, and recording evidence to the closing packet.
Supports rental, loss-of-rents, and premises-liability underwriting when leasing exposure exists.
Captures beneficiary and continuity needs when household or guarantor protection is requested.

recommendations.rationale: Habitational package is the best fit for a tenant_occupied multifamily because it aligns dwelling protection with the current closing workflow.
Title protection is recommended whenever acquisition, transfer, or refinance steps depend on clean ownership and lien status.
Landlord coverage becomes primary when rent interruption, tenant liability, or premises claims could affect transaction economics.

recommendations.policy_form: Term life with mortgage continuity rider
recommendations.rationale: Life-related continuity coverage is recommended when household dependents, guarantors, or debt-service plans depend on insured income continuity.

secure_exchange_controls.detail: NAIC-aligned notice, purpose limitation, and quote-sharing consent are checked before payload release.
ACORD payloads are exchanged using mTLS, field-level encryption, signed service identities, and correlation IDs.
Only entitled advisors, servicing staff, and approved partner roles can view recommendation details or request quotes.
Quote packets, title evidence, underwriting assumptions, and retransmission attempts are written to immutable servicing logs.

insurance_decision.naic_privacy_summary: NAIC-aligned privacy handling uses purpose-bound collection, role-based disclosure, third-party oversight, incident response linkage, and secure disposal expectations.
insurance_decision.secure_exchange_summary: EstateOS packages 4 ACORD-informed coverage payloads for investor servicing, encrypts transport, minimizes shared fields, and binds transmissions to request req-da02d507.
insurance_decision.explanation: Insurance review evaluated persona 'investor', property type 'multifamily', occupancy 'tenant_occupied', and transaction context 'closing'. Recommendations include homeowners, title, landlord, and life-related options while preserving confidential privacy posture, MFA=on, and release status 'released'.

validation_results.detail: Partner declared domain 'government' and adapter profile expects 'government'.
Payload release requires purpose-bound consent and an active session consent state.
Step-up MFA and verified identity improve confidence before external partner delivery.
Payload classification 'restricted' is checked against partner transport and storage controls.

routing_decisions.detail: Canonical contract CanonicalJurisdictionSubmission.v1 is routed into the primary adapter when validation and policy checks pass.
Fallback routing preserves interoperability evidence and hands exceptions to the correct human or secondary workflow.

compliance_evidence: Manual sign-off record for regulated filings
integration_decision.explanation: Integration hub normalized the government_registry payload into CanonicalJurisdictionSubmission.v1, ran expert chain residency_eligibility, document_validation, compliance_validation, and produced a release_ready decision with schema, trust, privacy, and routing evidence attached.

residency_decision.kyc_aml_summary: KYC status is approved, AML risk is medium, sanctions status is clear, and source-of-funds verification is complete.
residency_decision.privacy_summary: ISO/IEC 27701-aligned handling keeps residency evidence purpose-bound under the confidential privacy tier, with document minimization, consent-scoped sharing, and retention-aware compliance workflows.
residency_decision.explanation: Greece Golden Visa in Greece was evaluated for a household of 3 with property value 880,000, annual income 145,000, and liquid assets 280,000. Eligibility ended as 'eligible' because 6 rule checks passed, 0 need review, and 0 required documents are still missing. Compliance workflow steps preserve KYC/AML gates, document authenticity review, and ISO/IEC 27701 privacy controls before any external filing.
